description.message: VoiceMux Pairing with Direct Secure Push Sync and Custom Adapters

confirm_reset.message:
This will disconnect the PC and smartphone.
Draft text being edited in this room will be cleared on both the PC and the smartphone.
If you need to keep the draft, copy it first and save it by pasting into Spool or another app.

mobile_ready_title.message: You can input text into websites on this PC from your smartphone.

mobile_ready_copy.message: You can close this popup and keep using it. Open VoiceMuxHub only when you want to polish the text.

mobile_connecting_note.message: Phone presence is still being confirmed. If it already works, you can keep using voice input. Open VoiceMuxHub only when you want to polish the text.

options_description.message: Define custom CSS selectors for your favorite sites. You can find pre-made configurations in our Community Adapters Catalog.
